name: IRC_MP_GIG_APPLICATIONS
description: This table list out all the gig submissions of the seeker and also it will list out all the applications submitted by the seekers for a given opportunity.

columns.Name: APPLICATION_ID
columns.Comments: This column indicates the primary key column for IRC_MP_GIG_APPLICATIONS table

columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: This column indicates the person who submiited application for a gig, Foreign Key to PER_PERSONS table

columns.Name: GIG_ID
columns.Comments: This column indicates the gig to which this application has submitted, Foreign Key to IRC_MP_GIGS_B table

columns.Name: STATUS_CODE
columns.Comments: This column indicates state of the application in phases

columns.Name: OBJECT_STATUS
columns.Comments: This column indicates object status like ORA_ACTIVE/ORA_DELETED

columns.Name: WRITE_UP
columns.Comments: This column indicates the write up for this application

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
